category_sources: Official GitHub README describes LE as a text editor with block operations, binary clean editing, and hex mode.
source_facts.description says it is a text editor with block and binary operations.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is LE text editor.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation surface and includes features and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lavv17/le, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists binary clean editing, hex mode, and block operations.
source_facts.description identifies text editing with block and binary operations.
